title: better sniffer
description: the new gen of the old sniffer !
body:
**Make the Sniffer flashier and more like the Sniffer from the Origin Realm!**

When the Sniffer was added, I was very disappointed with its texture. Today, I'm offering you my Sniffer texture pack, which makes it much better.

My pack is for everyone who (like me) wants a refresh of the Sniffer!

⚠️ Please note, the pack is not finished. If you encounter any graphical bugs, feel free to contact me in my youtube channel RoBo_Go (even in english)

And now, here's a before/after to see the difference!

**before**
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc7a38a9b633ed5e62db3a6dca1f20d76e4964f8.png)
**after**
![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1a2d600fcd2b4c5d956ab0305be0a2c2ba34e8.png)
